### Name
The name of the game.

### Homepage
Link to the homepage of the game

### Other
Include other details, like a description, genres, screenshots, covers, etc.
Check other examples from the games [bucket](https://github.com/simeonradivoev/gameflow-store/tree/master/buckets/games) or check [game schema](https://github.com/simeonradivoev/gameflow-store/blob/master/schema/game.json) to see all the available fields. Providing as much info as needed is appreciated and more likely for the game to be added.
